subject: fix(css): add .md-render ol rule for numbered lists and clean up stale comment
body:
marked correctly produces <ol> for numbered lists (the old regex parser
incorrectly used <ul> for everything). Without this CSS rule, numbered
lists inside rendered markdown were unstyled. Also removed an outdated
comment in pattern.html referencing the old IIFE variable hoisting bug.

Tags: css, markdown, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: markdown-ux
Semver: patch

title: add .md-render ol rule for numbered lists and clean up stale comment
